name: Omniknight
description: I have gazed into the Omniscience, and it has gazed into me.

abilities.name: Degen Aura
abilities.description: Grants self an aura that applies movement speed slow to enemy units within the radius. Radius: 325. Move Speed Slow: 10%/20%/30%/40%. Aura Linger Duration: 1.

abilities.name: Healing Hammer
abilities.description: The All Seeing One converts all spell damage dealt into self heal per second. Spell Damage to Heal per Second Factor: 0.2. Damage Threshold: 0. Damage Timer: 1. Duration: 5.

abilities.name: Purification
abilities.description: Instantly heals a friendly unit and damages all nearby enemy units. Applies a secondary, less effective Purification instance after a short delay. Cast Range: 700. Damage Radius: 260. Damage: 90/160/230/300 (250/320/390/460). Heal: 90/160/230/300 (250/320/390/460). Damage Factor: (0.65). Heal Factor: (0.65). Cooldown: 15/14/13/12. Mana Cost: 90/105/120/135.

abilities.name: Repel
abilities.description: Grants debuff immunity to the targeted allied hero. The buff additionally grants bonus and health regeneration corresponding to the amount of current active debuffs on them. Cast Range: 700. Base Str Bonus: 6/12/18/24. Base Health Regen Bonus: 8/12/16/20. Str Bonus per Debuff: 3/4/5/6 (3.5/4.5/5.5/6.5). Health Regen Bonus per Debuff: 3/4/5/6 (3.5/4.5/5.5/6.5). Magic Resist Bonus: 60%. Cooldown: 50/45/40/35. Mana Cost: 90/105/120/135.

abilities.name: Hammer of Purity
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack range while dealing additional pure spell damage corresponding to a portion of Omniknight's main attack damage for one attack. Cast Range: 225. Base Damage: 25/50/75/100. Main Attack Damage to Damage Factor: 1.55/1.7/1.85/2 (2.3/2.45/2.6/2.75). Move Speed Slow: 75%. Slow Duration: 0.2. Cooldown: 20/15/10/5.

abilities.name: Guardian Angel
abilities.description: Grants allied units within the area-targeted location physical damage immunity. Cast Range: 600 (Global). Radius: 400 (700). Duration: 5/6/7 (130/131/132). Building Factor: (1). Heal Amp: (150%). Health Regen Amp: (150%). Cooldown: 100/90/80. Mana Cost: 125/175/225.
